inputs.label: Wake Time
inputs.businessContext: The hour of day when the worker typically wakes up (24-hour format)

businessContext_i18n.en: The hour of day when the worker typically wakes up (24-hour format)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşçinin tipik olarak uyandığı günün saati (24 saat formatı)

inputs.label: Current Time
inputs.businessContext: The hour of day for which alertness is to be predicted

businessContext_i18n.en: The hour of day for which alertness is to be predicted

inputs.label: Sleep Duration
inputs.businessContext: Duration of prior sleep, affecting baseline alertness (optional use)

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of prior sleep, affecting baseline alertness (optional use)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Önceki uykunun süresi, temel uyanıklığı etkiler (isteğe bağlı kullanım)

inputs.label: Circadian Amplitude
inputs.businessContext: Typical amplitude of circadian alertness fluctuation (deviation from baseline)

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical amplitude of circadian alertness fluctuation (deviation from baseline)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sirkadiyen uyanıklık dalgalanmasının tipik genliği (temel değerden sapma)

inputs.label: Baseline Alertness
inputs.businessContext: Baseline alertness level after adequate sleep, typically 70 (scale 0-100)

businessContext_i18n.en: Baseline alertness level after adequate sleep, typically 70 (scale 0-100)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeterli uykudan sonra temel uyanıklık seviyesi, tipik olarak 70 (0-100 ölçeği)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
